_comment: Pinned engine ref that src/astrolabe_callbacks/contract.py was vendored from, plus a sha256 of the vendored file. To update: edit `vendored_from`, run `GITHUB_TOKEN=$(gh auth token) python tools/vendor-contract.py`, commit both this file and the new contract.py. CI verifies the in-tree contract.py matches this hash — no network call required at PR time.
